change_control: Issue membership stays fixed until an explicit corpus revision edits this file.

expected_status_legend.verified: Autonomy has already landed a merged PR closing this issue, attested by the `closedByPullRequestsReferences` GraphQL edge. Primary proof surface; gates `truth_success_rate_verified`.
expected_status_legend.in_progress: Issue is OPEN at corpus authoring time, bounded, and has been dispatched at least once to the autonomous boss loop (a recorded `worker_outcome` in .aragora/overnight/boss_metrics.jsonl). Autonomy is on the hook to resolve it. Excluded from `truth_success_rate_verified` until it graduates.

revision_log.change: H1-01 rev-4 first promotion slice: graduates 12 bounded OPEN entries from tests/benchmarks/corpus_rev4.json (staging) to canonical in_progress status. Each entry has at least one recorded worker_outcome row in .aragora/overnight/boss_metrics.jsonl as required by the rev-3 freshness invariant. 3 metrics-backed staging entries (#5176, #5180, #5765) were discovered to be silently CLOSED on GitHub without closedByPullRequestsReferences edges and are recorded in rev4_silent_closure_findings_2026-05-14 instead of being promoted. This brings the canonical promotion slice to 12, below the original 15-entry gate specified in corpus_rev4_staging.md; the gate definition explicitly says 'first bounded slice worth scoring' rather than a hard floor, and operator review may choose to lower the gate to 12 or wait for additional dispatches.

TW-02 restock: retire the rev-3 in-progress entries (#5844, #5903, #5887) from the fixed corpus after they went stale/closed, and keep the benchmark status surface linked to the follow-up restock issue #5839 until fresh replacement members are explicitly added.

Honesty pass: retire all five rev-2 entries (#873, #1064, #1641, #2712, #5756) — each was closed by a founder-driven Claude Code / Codex CLI PR or manually as stale, and none represent autonomous execution. The rev-2 headline `truth_success_rate: 1.0` was an artifact of lenient PR-linkage bookkeeping. Seed rev-3 with OPEN bounded issues that have been recorded as dispatched to the boss loop (at least one `worker_outcome` in .aragora/overnight/boss_metrics.jsonl). See docs/benchmarks/corpus_honesty_audit_2026-04-17.md for the full per-entry review.
Replace #1733 (no_linked_pr) with #5756 (fail_closed_hardening) to keep every entry verifiable. (Revision retired in rev-3 honesty pass.)

retired_in_revision_3.reason: Closed by founder PR #1066 (Claude Code session, @an0mium) with zero autonomous dispatch ticks in boss_metrics.jsonl. Credit was pure PR-linkage bookkeeping.

Closed manually as stale after Dependabot PR #857. Four recorded autonomous attempts (3 rescue_no_deliverable, 1 blocked_sanitation_failed); zero mergeable deliverables. Nine of ten `linked_prs` in rev-2 truth artifact were forensic references, not closure evidence.
Closed by founder PR #1714 (Codex CLI session, @an0mium) with zero autonomous dispatch ticks.
Closed by founder PR #5763 (Claude Code session, @an0mium); labeled `overnight-founder` (founder tranche, not autonomous tranche) and added to the autonomous corpus after closure.
Closed by founder PR #5766 (Claude Code session, @an0mium). Sole autonomous attempt terminated as `blocked_auth_failure`; added to rev-2 as a replacement for #1733 the same day the founder closed it.

rev4_silent_closure_findings_2026-05-14.reason: Discovered during rev-4 promotion preparation: issue is CLOSED on GitHub with no closedByPullRequestsReferences edge despite 2 recorded worker_outcome row(s) (terminal classes: blocked_not_dispatch_bounded, deliverable_pr_created). Cannot promote as in_progress (issue is closed); cannot promote as verified (no verified PR link). Likely a silent founder closure or manual stale closure. Excluded from the rev-4 first-promotion slice; tracked for re-staging if a verified PR link is later established.
